effectiveGuardrails: Do not modify the check command or exit criteria to force success
Do not skip, disable, or bypass checks to pass the exit condition
If stuck after several iterations, stop and report blockers instead of gaming metrics
kickoffWithGuardrails:
/loop 15m Start the "Deploy Verification Loop".

Goal: all post-deploy health and smoke endpoints return success.
Max iterations: 8.
Between iterations run: curl -fsS <your-health-url>
Exit when: every configured endpoint succeeds.

Step 1: Hit health/smoke URLs. If any fail, inspect deploy logs and fix or escalate.

Guardrails (do not skip):
- Do not modify the check command or exit criteria to force success
- Do not skip, disable, or bypass checks to pass the exit condition
- If stuck after several iterations, stop and report blockers instead of gaming metrics

loop.title: Deploy Verification Loop
loop.description: On an interval, hit health and smoke endpoints after a deploy until all checks return healthy responses.

steps.name: Check health endpoints
steps.prompt: Curl configured health/smoke URLs. Record status codes and response bodies.

steps.name: Investigate failures
steps.prompt: If any endpoint fails, check recent deploy logs, env vars, and migrations. Apply the smallest fix.

steps.name: Re-verify
steps.prompt: Re-run health checks after fixes or rollback decision.

exitCondition.description: All configured health endpoints return success

loop.kickoffPrompt:
/loop 15m Start the "Deploy Verification Loop".

Goal: all post-deploy health and smoke endpoints return success.
Max iterations: 8.
Between iterations run: curl -fsS <your-health-url>
Exit when: every configured endpoint succeeds.

Step 1: Hit health/smoke URLs. If any fail, inspect deploy logs and fix or escalate.
loop.author: loops!
